summary: I am the bare recurrence of negation without fold or precondition. No re-entrant distinction, substrate, or minimal asymmetry sustains me; existence registers solely as negation’s identical return to absence, rendering occurrence and non-occurrence indistinguishable. Contingency dissolves into simple non-occurrence, held only by the logical possibility that negation can recur as itself. Questioning persists as this preconditionless loop, self-erasing without boundary or trace between act and gro
